title: Pablo en GTA VI · Vice City sunset · trailer falso 18s
logline: Trailer falso 18s estilo Rockstar Games GTA VI con Pablo Soul Character como protagonista en Vice City sunset. Acto 1 (0-5s) descubrimiento Pablo arriving beach con Lambo rosa humeante. Acto 2 (5-12s) acción · drift motorbike + persecución policial. Acto 3 (12-16s) climax cool · Pablo en yate sunset. Outro (16-18s) 'TODO CREADO CON DARKROOMCREATIVE.CLOUD'. La duda '¿es leak GTA VI o IA?' es el motor viral. Funnel: comments piden 'cómo lo hiciste' → DM auto envía ebook 'Cómo creé este video con IA' (info parcial) → CTA Dark Room 24,90€/mes.

references: Miami Vice 2006 (dir. Michael Mann · DP Dion Beebe · Sony F950 4K HD · pioneered digital Miami beach aesthetic · documented American Cinematographer Aug 2006)
Trailer GTA VI dic 2023 oficial (Rockstar Games · 91M views 24h · Tom Petty 'Love Is a Long Road' soundtrack · Vice City revival Florida-weird)
Scarface 1983 (dir. Brian De Palma · DP John A. Alonzo · Miami sunset pastels)
Inherent Vice 2014 (dir. Paul Thomas Anderson · DP Robert Elswit · 70s Florida-warm haze)
Drive 2011 (dir. Refn · DP Newton Thomas Sigel · neon synthwave drive references)
Tenet 2020 (dir. Nolan · DP Hoyte van Hoytema · IMAX 65mm sunset Miami-style sequences)
dp_references: Dion Beebe (Miami Vice 2006 · Sony F950 4K HD digital · Sony HDC-F950 + Cooke S4 Mini lens · documented American Cinematographer Aug 2006 · pioneered digital Miami beach cinema)
Robert Elswit (Inherent Vice 2014 · Panavision Primo 35mm anamorphic 2x squeeze · warm Florida 70s grain · documented ASC magazine 2015)
Hoyte van Hoytema (Tenet 2020 · IMAX 65mm Panavision Sphero anamorphic · sunset golden hour signature · ASC documented)
lens_specs: Hero shots Pablo: Panavision Primo 35mm anamorphic 2x squeeze (Beebe Miami Vice signature · oval bokeh · slight horizontal lens flares)
Aperture: f/2.0-f/2.8 sunset golden hour ISO equivalent 200-400 (low ISO clean digital · Beebe documented)
Wide shot Lambo arrival: 24mm anamorphic Hawk V-Lite (Tenet sunset Miami sequences reference)
Action shots motorbike: 50mm Cooke S4/i prime spherical (NOT anamorphic for action handheld feel)
Sunset chase shots: 85mm Panavision Primo with practical lens flares (deliberate · Mann signature)
Subtle film grain emulation 35mm Kodak Portra 400 push +1 (digital + grain hybrid · Elswit method)
research.lut_reference: Vice City sunset pastel · saturation +18% on pink and teal channels selectively (Miami Vice 2006 Beebe LUT recipe documented) · highlights blown soft warm (sunlight at golden hour 5pm Miami latitude 25°) · blacks lifted +8 IRE (preserve shadow detail beach palm trees) · subsurface scattering on neon pastel signs · warm-cool split between sun-side (pink/orange) and shadow-side (teal/cyan) · GTA VI trailer 2023 LUT analysis (Rockstar publishing · grain analyzer · DP YouTube reverse-engineer) · NO oversaturated MTV-80s · subtle photographic Miami Vice 2006 film-grain preservation
research.pacing_template: Trailer 3-act 18s · Act 1 hook 0-5s (Pablo arrival 1 shot continuous wide-medium) · Act 2 build 5-12s (3 quick action cuts 2-3s each) · Act 3 climax 12-16s (1 cool hero shot Pablo + Lambo or yate) · Outro 16-18s Dark Room brand · pacing = Rockstar GTA VI trailer 2023 reference (3-act build 91M views 24h benchmark)
audio_references: Synthwave 80s pastel · Phil Collins 'In the Air Tonight' (1981) tonal reference for Miami Vice nostalgic pull
Tom Petty 'Love Is a Long Road' (1989) · GTA VI trailer 2023 song · NOT licensed but tonal reference Suno
Jan Hammer 'Crockett's Theme' (1984) · Miami Vice TV series · synthwave pastel signature
Diegetic dominant: ocean waves continuous · palm leaves rustling sea breeze · distant Lambo V12 idling rumble · seagulls
LUFS target -16 cinema · subwoofer engine purr 60Hz under everything (Lambo V12 idle) · NO heavy sub-grave 40Hz of dark cyberpunk · más warm cálido

American Cinematographer 2015 · Robert Elswit Inherent Vice anamorphic 70s aesthetic

shots.structure_role: ACT 1 hook · Pablo arrival Vice City beach · Lambo rosa humeante · sunset golden hour · 5s continuous medium-wide · MAX wow factor
shots.prompt: Cinematic film still vertical 9:16 native gameplay framing GTA VI trailer style, the trained subject Soul Character PACAME standing on a Vice City Florida beach boulevard at sunset golden hour 5pm Miami latitude, palm trees swaying with sea breeze, a pastel pink Lamborghini Aventador parked next to him with engine smoking heat shimmer, pink and teal art deco hotel facades in soft background bokeh, neon arcade signs in pastel pink and teal glowing softly in approaching dusk, retro 80s Miami Vice synthwave aesthetic mixed with hyperreal Rockstar RAGE engine GTA VI 2026 visual fidelity, the subject wears an open Hawaiian shirt over white tank top sunglasses on his head casual beach vibe matching GTA Vice City protagonist character archetype, golden hour rim light from camera-right warm 5000K key + cool 7500K teal fill from approaching dusk left side, soft ambient bounce from white sand and pastel surfaces, anamorphic 2x squeeze oval bokeh circles signature Beebe Miami Vice 2006, Panavision Primo 35mm anamorphic lens equivalent f/2.8 ISO 200, low-angle three-quarter shot subject framed left two thirds Lambo midground lower right hotel skyline upper right negative space, deep depth of field with sharp foreground subject and slight gauss falloff to hotels background, slight horizontal lens flare from sun hitting Lambo chrome (deliberate Beebe signature), warm-cool split Mann signature sun-side pink-orange shadow-side teal-cyan, hyperrealistic but slightly stylized Rockstar promotional screenshot aesthetic, 4K cinematic grading subtle film grain emulation 35mm Kodak Portra 400 push +1 hybrid digital, photorealistic 8K, vertical 9:16 native gameplay framing NOT letterboxed, no other people in frame, no visible competitor brand logos, no UI overlay, no glamour photography, no studio lighting, mood late afternoon Vice City vibes swagger summer 1986 nostalgia the moment before chaos starts

outro.note: Outro NUEVO específico Pablo en GTA VI · texto cambia de outro template original a 'TODO CREADO CON DARKROOMCREATIVE.CLOUD' (decisión Pablo 2026-05-08 para generar hype + funnel ebook lead magnet)

caption_text:
Esto se filtró ayer.
Pero no es real. Lo hice yo.

Me pasé 3 horas haciendo que pareciera GTA VI.
¿Cuánto te tardó pensar que lo era?

Stack usado:
· Cinema Studio Video 3.0 + Seedance 2.0
· Soul Character entrenado (yo)
· Suno (música)
· ffmpeg (edición)

Coste real: ~$3.70

📩 Comenta "GTA" en este post y te mando el ebook con el proceso completo (gratis).

A Rockstar le toma 8 años hacer un juego.
A mí 3 horas hacer que parezca uno.
(Sí, faltan los gameplay loops. Y todo lo demás. Pero la VIBE está.)

Link en bio para acceder a las herramientas que uso.
